cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes:
There are no cutscenes and there is no background music. Every couple of seconds an error dialogue appears informing that the cutscenes and the background music are unavailable due to the lack of the Windows Media Player 9 libraries.
----------------
The game requires WMP9 to be installed using winetricks BUT it's impossible in Proton as it always defaults to the 64 bit arch. This is not the the first time this puzzling decision affects games that depend on older libraries. There is a simple solution for this: allow the steam user the choice to switch over to the 32bit arch. The same problem affects many well known games like Darksiders and Resident Evil 1 Remake Remastered.
title: Wars and Warriors: Joan of Arc

notes: Just left click on the black screen and enjoy
title: Wars and Warriors: Joan of Arc
